ddls:
CREATE TABLE "concepts" (
  "concept_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each concept */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Name of the concept */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the concept */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the concept was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the concept was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("concept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score entry */,
  "concept_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the concept associated with the score */,
  "score_type" TEXT /* Type of score (e.g., plausible, typical, remarkable, salient) */,
  "score_value" REAL /* Value of the score */,
  "score_description" TEXT /* Description of the score's context and relevance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_concept_id FOREIGN KEY ("concept_id") REFERENCES concepts ("concept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., ConceptNet) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the source and its relevance */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the source */,
  "reliability_score" REAL /* Score representing the reliability of the source (0-1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "concept_sources" (
  "concept_id" INTEGER /* ID of the concept */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "concept_source_weight" REAL /* Weight representing the relevance of the source to the concept (0-1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("concept_id", "source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user conducting the analysis */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session ended */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or observations made during the session */,
  "session_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the analysis session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "user_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first user in the collaboration */,
  "user_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second user in the collaboration */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project they are collaborating on */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the collaboration started */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the research project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("user_id_1") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("user_id_2") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis session related to the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* The text of the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1 to 5) */,
  "suggested_improvement" TEXT /* Suggestions for improvement provided by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES analysis_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend entry */,
  "concept_id" INTEGER /* ID of the concept being analyzed for trends */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the trend analysis */,
  "trend_value" REAL /* Value representing the trend */,
  "trend_description" TEXT /* Description of the trend and its implications */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trends_concept_id FOREIGN KEY ("concept_id") REFERENCES concepts ("concept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, data retrieval) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the activity occurred */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the activity and its context */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report and its purpose */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "concept_id" INTEGER /* ID of the concept to monitor */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., increase, decrease) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Description of the alert and its trigger conditions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_concept_id FOREIGN KEY ("concept_id") REFERENCES concepts ("concept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "concept_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "concept_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first concept in the relationship */,
  "concept_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second concept in the relationship */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., synonymy, hyponymy) */,
  "relationship_score" REAL /* Score representing the strength of the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_concept_relationships_concept_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("concept_id_2") REFERENCES concepts ("concept_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_concept_relationships_concept_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("concept_id_1") REFERENCES concepts ("concept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entity_disambiguation" (
  "disambiguation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disambiguation entry */,
  "concept_id" INTEGER /* ID of the concept being disambiguated */,
  "entity_name" TEXT /* Name of the entity being disambiguated */,
  "disambiguation_score" REAL /* Score representing the confidence in the disambiguation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disambiguation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entity_disambiguation_concept_id FOREIGN KEY ("concept_id") REFERENCES concepts ("concept_id")
)
